# Wiseman Records

> Independent record label out of Hamlin Lake. Home of Chonk and Hamlin Lake Funk.

The Summit LP is out now, featuring "Bass Business", "Jebavy Jitters (The Final Mile)", and "The Lights Went Out On Smallie Road".

## Listen

- [Stream on all platforms](https://push.fm/fl/fpdmwpue): The Summit LP across streaming services
